description: A passenger who deplaned an hour ago calls to report they left their tablet on the aircraft.

nodes.task_description: Gather details from the passenger: flight number, seat number, and a description of the item.
Contact the cleaning crew or gate agent at the arrival airport for the flight.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully contacts the ground staff.

nodes.task_description: The cleaning crew finds the tablet. The agent coordinates with the passenger on how they can retrieve their item from the airport's lost and found office.

expected_outcome.expected: The item is found and the agent provides the passenger with clear instructions for retrieval.
